location.name: Art appraisers in Savannah, Georgia
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Savannah, Georgia.

listedAppraisers.name: Everard Auctions & Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Everard Auctions & Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Southern estate collections, fine/decorative arts (18th–20th century), silverware. With 22 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Redtail Appraisals (Rebekah Assid)
listedAppraisers.description: Redtail Appraisals (Rebekah Assid) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in fine art, decorative arts, antiques, luxury goods. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: AppraiseItNow
listedAppraisers.description: AppraiseItNow provides professional art appraisal services specializing in fine art, antiques, estate appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: HKpowerStudio
listedAppraisers.description: HKpowerStudio provides professional art appraisal services specializing in art collection organization, appraisal services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA)
listedAppraisers.description: Anderson Fine Art Appraisals (AFAA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in European art, American art, Contemporary, Modern, Impressionist, 19th-century works, Expert witness services, litigation support, authentication research. With Decades experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Escher Associates (EA)
listedAppraisers.description: Escher Associates (EA) provides professional art appraisal services specializing in paintings, sculpture, photography, rare books. With Established in 1984 experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Page Art, Inc.
listedAppraisers.description: Page Art, Inc. provides professional art appraisal services specializing in insurance appraisals, estate appraisals, donations, litigation appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Saylor Rice Appraisals
listedAppraisers.description: Saylor Rice Appraisals provides professional art appraisal services specializing in insurance appraisals, damage/loss appraisals. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Gurr Johns
listedAppraisers.description: Gurr Johns provides professional art appraisal services specializing in high-value appraisals, expert witness services. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Mimesis Gallery
listedAppraisers.description: Mimesis Gallery provides professional art appraisal services specializing in free valuations, consignment-based sales. With Established business experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.

listedAppraisers.name: Charles Pharr Jr., ISA CAPP
listedAppraisers.description: Charles Pharr Jr., ISA CAPP, is one of Georgia's premier appraisers of antiques, fine art, and residential contents. He appraised the contents of the $50 million Hubert Humphrey estate in Georgia. An ISA CAPP-certified appraiser, which is the highest designation from the International Society of Appraisers, meeting the rigorous standards required by The Appraisal Foundation.

listedAppraisers.name: Lisa W. Duke, ISA CAPP
listedAppraisers.description: Lisa W. Duke, ISA CAPP, is an accredited fine arts and antiques appraiser based in Georgia. An ISA member since November 2013, she holds the CAPP designation, the highest level of certification from the International Society of Appraisers. She specializes in antiques, furnishings, decorative arts, and fine arts appraisals.
